# Simple (non-joint) conf change: add a voter.
# A single voter addition uses the simple protocol, so there is no joint
# config and auto-leave is false.

add-nodes id=1 voters=1
----
INFO 1 switched to configuration voters=(1)
INFO 1 became follower at term 0

apply-conf-change id=1 changes=v2
----
voters=(1 2) learners=() auto-leave=false
